things.name: Galapagos Islands
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage - depart from Guayaquil for Darwin's evolution laboratory

things.name: Las Penas Neighbourhood & Cerro Santa Ana
things.description: Historic painted wooden houses climbing 444 steps to a lighthouse with city views

things.name: Malecon 2000
things.description: Regenerated 2.5km riverside promenade with museums, gardens and the botanical garden

things.name: Parque Seminario (Iguana Park)
things.description: City square overrun with large free-roaming iguanas - extraordinary urban wildlife

things.name: MAAC Precolumbian Museum
things.description: Ecuador's finest pre-Columbian art with remarkable Valdivia figurines

things.name: Guayaquil Botanical Garden
things.description: 200 orchid species - Ecuador is the world's most orchid-rich country

things.name: Isla Santay Nature Reserve
things.description: Freshwater island in the Guayas river with crocodiles and giant ceiba trees

things.name: Mercado Central
things.description: Fresh ceviche, cangrejada (crab) and encebollado fish soup

things.name: Inaquito Artisanal Chocolate Tour
things.description: Ecuador produces the world's finest cacao - visit a bean-to-bar chocolate factory

things.name: Encebollado de Pescado
things.description: Ecuador's national hangover cure - tuna soup with yuca, onion and lime
